MFE optimisation for the three-zone TiO2/N-BK7 metasurface in-coupler.\n\nKey problem: current MFE=20.83%; need MFE≥25%.\nBottleneck: zone 3 η_T(-10°)=16.4% (paper ideal: 27%).\n\nStrategy:\n - Fix w and r from Table 1 (already close to those values in current best).\n - Scan (x_p, Λ_y) grid at XFOV=-10° to find better starting geometries.\n - Run Nelder-Mead from best scan point for each zone.\n - Use ideal paper targets (η_T, η_R) = (0.96/0.54/0.27, 0.04/0.46/0.73).\n - Heavy weight on XFOV=-10° in merit (the MFE bottleneck angle).\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json, time\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import minimize\n\nfrom rcwa_metasurface import (\n    XFOV_DEG, THETA_GLASS, PERIOD_X,\n    run_rcwa, angle_sweep, compute_mfe,\n    plot_efficiency_curves, plot_mfe_curve, plot_zone_geometry,\n)\n\nRESULTS_FILE = \"zone_results.json\"\n\n# Ideal paper targets (Fig 2e), assuming R[-1,0]≈0\nT_IDEAL = [0.96, 0.54, 0.27]\nR_IDEAL = [0.04, 0.46, 0.73]\n\nIDX_NEG10 = 0   # XFOV=-10° index\n\n# Table 1 (w, r) values — good starting point for all zones\nTABLE1_WR = [\n    (110.0, 50.0),    # Zone 1\n    (110.0, 85.0),    # Zone 2\n    (100.0, 98.0),    # Zone 3\n]\n\nnG_FAST = 35   # harmonics for grid scan (speed)\nnG_FULL = 51   # harmonics for local opt and final sweep\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Merit: weighted MSE targeting ideal (T, R) across XFOV\n# Heavy weight at XFOV=-10° (the MFE bottleneck)\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef merit_weighted(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_FULL, heavy_w=8.0):\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if (w < 30 or w > 280 or r < 15 or r > 200 or\n            xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 50 or ly < 60 or ly > 600):\n        return 1e6\n\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep((w, r, xp, ly), nG=nG)\n\n    weights = np.ones(len(XFOV_DEG))\n    weights[IDX_NEG10] = heavy_w\n    weights /= weights.sum()\n\n    T_m = float(np.dot(weights, T_arr))\n    R_m = float(np.dot(weights, R_arr))\n    return (T_m - tgt_T)**2 + (R_m - tgt_R)**2\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Single-angle loss (used only in grid scan for speed)\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef loss_at_neg10(w, r, xp, ly, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_FAST):\n    try:\n        T, R = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10], nG=nG)\n        return (T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2, T, R\n    except Exception:\n        return 1e6, 0.0, 0.0\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# 2-D grid scan (x_p × Λ_y) at XFOV=-10° only\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R):\n    n = len(xp_arr) * len(ly_arr)\n    print(f\"  Grid scan zone {zone_id+1} \"\n          f\"(w={w:.0f}, r={r:.0f}): {len(xp_arr)}×{len(ly_arr)}={n} pts\", flush=True)\n    t0 = time.time()\n    results = []\n    for xp in xp_arr:\n        for ly in ly_arr:\n            loss, T, R = loss_at_neg10(w, r, xp, ly, tgt_T, tgt_R)\n            results.append((loss, T, R, [w, r, xp, ly]))\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    dt = time.time() - t0\n    print(f\"    done in {dt:.0f}s  \"\n          f\"best: η_T={results[0][1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={results[0][2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"loss={results[0][0]:.5f}  xp={results[0][3][2]:.0f}  Ly={results[0][3][3]:.0f}\")\n    return results\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local (Nelder-Mead) optimisation\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=400, nG=nG_FULL):\n    res = minimize(\n        lambda x: merit_weighted(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG),\n        p0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n        options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-5},\n    )\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\":  best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss\":    float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Per-zone optimisation\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef optimise_zone(zone_id, prev_params, xp_arr, ly_arr, top_k=5, maxiter=400):\n    tgt_T = T_IDEAL[zone_id]\n    tgt_R = R_IDEAL[zone_id]\n    w, r  = TABLE1_WR[zone_id]\n\n    print(f\"\\n{'='*60}\")\n    print(f\"Zone {zone_id+1}  target η_T={tgt_T*100:.0f}%  η_R={tgt_R*100:.0f}%\")\n    print(f\"{'='*60}\")\n\n    # Print current starting efficiency\n    T0_cur = run_rcwa(*prev_params, THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10], nG=nG_FULL)\n    print(f\"  Current params η_T(-10°)={T0_cur[0]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"η_R(-10°)={T0_cur[1]*100:.1f}%\")\n\n    # Grid scan\n    scan = grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R)\n\n    # Also include previous best (different w,r but worth trying)\n    candidates = [s[3] for s in scan[:top_k]]\n    candidates.append(list(prev_params))  # include prev best\n\n    best_loss = 1e9\n    best_res  = None\n\n    for ci, p0 in enumerate(candidates):\n        tag = \"prev\" if ci == len(candidates) - 1 else f\"scan#{ci+1}\"\n        print(f\"  Local opt from {tag} (loss_scan={scan[min(ci, top_k-1)][0]:.5f}): \",\n              end=\"\", flush=True)\n        t0 = time.time()\n        res = local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=maxiter)\n        dt = time.time() - t0\n        T_n = np.array(res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n        R_n = np.array(res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n        print(f\"loss={res['loss']:.5f}  η_T(-10°)={T_n:.1f}%  \"\n              f\"η_R(-10°)={R_n:.1f}%  ({dt:.0f}s)\")\n        if res[\"loss\"] < best_loss:\n            best_loss = res[\"loss\"]\n            best_res  = res\n\n    w_b, r_b, xp_b, ly_b = best_res[\"params\"]\n    T_b = np.array(best_res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n    R_b = np.array(best_res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n    print(f\"  → Best zone {zone_id+1}: loss={best_loss:.5f}  \"\n          f\"η_T(-10°)={T_b:.1f}%  η_R(-10°)={R_b:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"[w={w_b:.0f} r={r_b:.0f} xp={xp_b:.0f} Ly={ly_b:.0f}]\")\n\n    return best_res\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"#\"*60)\n    print(\"#  MFE-focused optimisation  (ideal paper Fig 2e targets)\")\n    print(\"#\"*60)\n\n    # Load previous results\n    try:\n        with open(RESULTS_FILE) as fh:\n            prev = json.load(fh)\n        zone_results = []\n        for k in range(3):\n for r in z[\"R_pct\"]],\n            })\n        print(\"Loaded previous results from zone_results.json\")\n        prev_mfe = prev.get(\"mfe\", 0.0)\n        print(f\"Previous MFE =            })\n        print(\"Using Table 1 starting geometry (no previous results found).\")\n\n    best_results = [dict(r) for r in zone_results]\n\n    # ── Zone 3: the MFE bottleneck ────────────────────────────────────────────\n    # Fix w=100, r=98 (Table 1). zone {zone_id+1} \"\n          f\"(w={w:.0f}, r={r:.0f}): {len(xp_arr)}×{len(ly_arr)}={n} pts\", flush=True)\n    t0 = time.time()\n    results = []\n    for xp in xp_arr:\n        for ly in ly_arr:\n            loss, T, R = loss_at_neg10(w, r, xp, ly, tgt_T, tgt_R)\n            results.append((loss, T, R, [w, r, xp, ly]))\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    dt = time.time() - t0\n    print(f\"    done in {dt:.0f}s  \"\n          f\"best: η_T={results[0][1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={results[0][2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"loss={results[0][0]:.5f}  xp={results[0][3][2]:.0f}  Ly={results[0][3][3]:.0f}\")\n    return results\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local (Nelder-Mead) optimisation\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=400, nG=nG_FULL):\n    res = minimize(\n        lambda x: merit_weighted(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG),\n        p0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n        options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-5},\n    )\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\":  best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss\":    float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Per-zone optimisation\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef optimise_zone(zone_id, prev_params, xp_arr, ly_arr, top_k=5, maxiter=400):\n    tgt_T = T_IDEAL[zone_id]\n    tgt_R = R_IDEAL[zone_id]\n    w, r  = TABLE1_WR[zone_id]\n\n    print(f\"\\n{'='*60}\")\n    print(f\"Zone {zone_id+1}  target η_T={tgt_T*100:.0f}%  η_R={tgt_R*100:.0f}%\")\n    print(f\"{'='*60}\")\n\n    # Print current starting efficiency\n    T0_cur = run_rcwa(*prev_params, THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10], nG=nG_FULL)\n    print(f\"  Current params η_T(-10°)={T0_cur[0]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"η_R(-10°)={T0_cur[1]*100:.1f}%\")\n\n    # Grid scan\n    scan = grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R)\n\n    # Also include previous best (different w,r but worth trying)\n    candidates = [s[3] for s in scan[:top_k]]\n    candidates.append(list(prev_params))  # include prev best\n\n    best_loss = 1e9\n    best_res  = None\n\n    for ci, p0 in enumerate(candidates):\n        tag = \"prev\" if ci == len(candidates) - 1 else f\"scan#{ci+1}\"\n        print(f\"  Local opt from {tag} (loss_scan={scan[min(ci, top_k-1)][0]:.5f}): \",\n              end=\"\", flush=True)\n        t0 = time.time()\n        res = local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=maxiter)\n        dt = time.time() - t0\n        T_n = np.array(res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n        R_n = np.array(res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n        print(f\"loss={res['loss']:.5f}  η_T(-10°)={T_n:.1f}%  \"\n              f\"η_R(-10°)={R_n:.1f}%  ({dt:.0f}s)\")\n        if res[\"loss\"] < best_loss:\n            best_loss = res[\"loss\"]\n            best_res  = res\n\n    w_b, r_b, xp_b, ly_b = best_res[\"params\"]\n    T_b = np.array(best_res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n    R_b = np.array(best_res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n    print(f\"  → Best zone {zone_id+1}: loss={best_loss:.5f}  \"\n          f\"η_T(-10°)={T_b:.1f}%  η_R(-10°)={R_b:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"[w={w_b:.0f} r={r_b:.0f} xp={xp_b:.0f} Ly={ly_b:.0f}]\")\n\n    return best_res\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"#\"*60)\n    print(\"#  MFE-focused optimisation  (ideal paper Fig 2e targets)\")\n z = prev[\"zones\"][k]\n            zone_results.append({\n                \"params\":  z[\"params\"],\n                \"T_array\": [t/100 for t in z[\"T_pct\"]],\n                \"R_array\": [r/100 for r in z[\"R_pct\"]],\n            })\n        print(\"Loaded previous results from zone_results.json\")\n        prev_mfe = prev.get(\"mfe\", 0.0)\n        print(f\"Previous MFE = angle_sweep(tuple(p), nG=nG_FULL)\n            zone_results.append({\n                \"params\": list(p),\n                \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n                \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n            })\n        print(\"Using Table 1 starting geometry (no previous results found).\")\n\n    best_results = [dict(r) for r in zone_results]\n\n    # ── Zone 3: the MFE bottleneck ────────────────────────────────────────────\n    # Fix w=100, r=98 (Table 1). Scan xp ∈ [80, 430], Ly ∈ [100, 350].\n    xp3 = np.arange(80, 440, 30)    # 12 values\n    ly3 = np.arange(100, 360, 30)   # 9 values  (108 scan pts)\n    res3 = optimise_zone(\n        zone_id=2,\n        prev_params=zone_results[2][\"params\"],\n        xp_arr=xp3, ly_arr=ly3,\n        top_k=5, maxiter=500,\n    )\n    # Accept if it improves η_T(-10°) without sacrificing too much η_R\n    T3_new = np.array(res3[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    T3_old = np.array(zone_results[2][\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    if T3_new > T3_old - 0.02:   # accept if not worse by >2%\n        best_results[2] = res3\n\n    # ── Zone 2: improve η_R(-10°) from ~34% toward 46% ───────────────────────\n    xp2 = np.arange(80, 400, 30)\n    ly2 = np.arange(120, 380, 30)\n    res2 = optimise_zone(\n        zone_id=1,\n        prev_params=zone_results[1][\"params\"],\n        xp_arr=xp2, ly_arr=ly2,\n        top_k=5, maxiter=500,\n    )\n    T2_new = np.array(res2[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    T2_old = np.array(zone_results[1][\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    if T2_new > T2_old - 0.02:\n        best_results[1] = res2\n\n    # ── Zone 1: quick re-optimise ─────────────────────────────────────────────\n    xp1 = np.arange(60, 350, 35)\n    ly1 = np.arange(200, 600, 50)\n    res1 = optimise_zone(\n        zone_id=0,\n        prev_params=zone_results[0][\"params\"],\n        xp_arr=xp1, ly_arr=ly1,\n        top_k=3, maxiter=400,\n    )\n    T1_new = np.array(res1[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    T1_old = np.array(zone_results[0][\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    if T1_new > T1_old - 0.02:\n        best_results[0] = res1\n\n    # Save JSON\n    out = {\n        \"xfov_deg\":        XFOV_DEG.tolist(),\n        \"theta_glass_deg\": THETA_GLASS.tolist(),\n        \"mfe\":             mfe_final,\n        \"mfe_percent\":     mfe_final * 100,\n        \"mfe_passes\":      bool(mfe_final >= 0.25),\n        \"coupling_pct\":    (coupling * 100).tolist(),\n        \"zones\": [\n            {\n                \"zone\":       k + 1,\n                \"params\":     best_results[k][\"params\"],\n                \"source\":     \"mfe_opt\",\n                \"T_pct\":      (T_zones[k] * 100).tolist(),\n                \"R_pct\":      (R_zones[k] * 100).tolist(),\n                \"T_mean_pct\": float(np.mean(T_zones[k]) * 100),\n                \"R_mean_pct\": float(np.mean(R_zones[k]) * 100),\n            }\n            for k in range(3)\n        ],\n    }\n    with open(RESULTS_FILE, \"w\") as fh:\n        json.dump(out, fh, indent=2)\n    print(f\"\\nSaved: {RESULTS_FILE}\")\n\n    plot_efficiency_curves(T_zones, R_zones, params=params_list)\n    plot_mfe_curve(coupling, mfe=mfe_final)\n    plot_zone_geometry(params_list)\n\n    return mfe_final\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":18,"newStart":1,"newLines":15,"lines":[" \"\"\"","-Focused MFE optimization for the three-zone TiO2/N-BK7 metasurface in-coupler.","+Focused MFE optimisation for the three-zone TiO2/N-BK7 metasurface in-coupler."," ","-Strategy:","-1. optimization for the three-zone TiO2/N-BK7 metasurface in-coupler.\n\nStrategy:\n1. Zone 1 is already good (η_T≈76%, η_R≈8%). Keep but re-scan to improve.\n2. Zones 2/3 are the bottleneck. Scan (x_p, Λ_y) grid targeting ideal targets\n   (η_T, η_R) = (0.54, 0.46) and (0.27, 0.73) FROM THE PAPER (Fig 2e).\n3. Minimize IDEAL loss at XFOV=-10° (the MFE-limiting angle) with STRONG\n   weighting, since the key issue is η_T,3(-10°)=16.4% (needs ≥25%).\n4. Run Nelder-Mead from best scan point.\n5. Compute final MFE; save JSON + PNG.\n\nThe key physics: at θ_glass=41.19° (XFOV=-10°) we need to suppress the\nbackward-diffracted R[-1,0] order in glass so that T[-1,0] + R[0,0] ≈ 100%.\nThis requires the right (x_p, Λ_y) combination.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json, time\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import minimize\n\nfrom rcwa_metasurface import (\n    XFOV_DEG, THETA_GLASS, PERIOD_X,\n    IDEAL_TARGETS, REALISTIC_TARGETS,\n    N_BK7, N_TIO2, N_AIR, HEIGHT_NM,\n    run_rcwa, angle_sweep, compute_mfe,\n    plot_efficiency_curves, plot_mfe_curve, plot_zone_geometry,\n)\n\nRESULTS_FILE = \"zone_results.json\"\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Bottleneck angle index: XFOV=-10° (index 0)\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nIDX_NEG10 = 0   # XFOV_DEG[0] = -10.0°\nIDX_ZERO  = 10  # XFOV_DEG[10] = 0.0°\nIDX_POS10 = 20  # XFOV_DEG[20] = +10.0°\n\n# Ideal targets from paper Fig 2(e)\n# These assume R[-1,0] ≈ 0 (sum = 100%)\nT_IDEAL = [0.96, 0.54, 0.27]\nR_IDEAL = [0.04, 0.46, 0.73]\n\n# Fallback realistic targets (R[-1,0] included)\nT_REAL = [0.75, 0.52, 0.26]\nR_REAL = [0.08, 0.35, 0.60]\n\nnG_SCAN = 51    # harmonics for scans\nnG_OPT  = 51    # harmonics for optimization\n\n\ndef merit_zone_ideal(x, zone_id, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_OPT):\n    \"\"\"\n    Merit function: weighted MSE at XFOV=-10° (weight 8) and remaining angles.\n    Targets ideal (sum=100%) to minimise R[-1,0] loss.\n    \"\"\"\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if w < 30 or w > 280 or r < 15 or r > 200:\n        return 1e6\n    if xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 30:\n        return 1e6\n    if ly < 60 or ly > 500:\n        return 1e6\n\n    # Evaluate at three representative angles: -10°, 0°, +10°\n    angles = [THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10], THETA_GLASS[IDX_ZERO], THETA_GLASS[IDX_POS10]]\n    weights = [8.0, 1.0, 1.0]  # very heavy weight on bottleneck angle\n\n    loss = 0.0\n    for tg, wt in zip(angles, weights):\n        T, R = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, tg, nG=nG)\n        loss += wt * ((T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2)\n\n    return loss / sum(weights)\n\n\ndef merit_zone_full(x, zone_id, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_OPT):\n    \"\"\"Merit over full XFOV, heavy weight at -10°.\"\"\"\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if w < 30 or w > 280 or r < 15 or r > 200:\n        return 1e6\n    if xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 30:\n        return 1e6\n    if ly < 60 or ly > 500:\n        return 1e6\n\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep((w, r, xp, ly), nG=nG)\n\n    weights = np.ones(len(XFOV_DEG))\n    weights[IDX_NEG10] = 8.0   # -10° bottleneck\n    weights /= weights.sum()\n\n    T_mean = float(np.dot(weights, T_arr))\n    R_mean = float(np.dot(weights, R_arr))\n    return (T_mean - tgt_T)**2 + (R_mean - tgt_R)**2\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# 2-D grid scan over (x_p, Λ_y) for fixed (w, r)\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef grid_scan_xp_ly(\n    zone_id: int,\n    w_nm: float,\n    r_nm: float,\n    xp_range,   # array of x_p values\n    ly_range,   # array of Λ_y values\n    tgt_T: float,\n    tgt_R: float,\n    nG: int = nG_SCAN,\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Scan (x_p, Λ_y) at XFOV=-10° to find best starting geometry.\n    Returns sorted list of (loss, [w, r, xp, ly]).\n    \"\"\"\n    tg0 = THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10]\n    results = []\n\n    n_total = len(xp_range) * len(ly_range)\n    print(f\"  Grid scan zone {zone_id+1}: {len(xp_range)} × {len(ly_range)} = {n_total} points\")\n    t0 = time.time()\n\n    for i, xp in enumerate(xp_range):\n        for j, ly in enumerate(ly_range):\n            try:\n                T, R = run_rcwa(w_nm, r_nm, xp, ly, tg0, nG=nG)\n                loss = (T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2\n                results.append((loss, T, R, [w_nm, r_nm, xp, ly]))\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n        if (i + 1) % 3 == 0:\n            elapsed = time.time() - t0\n            rate = (i + 1) * len(ly_range) / elapsed\n            remaining = (n_total - (i + 1) * len(ly_range)) / rate\n            print(f\"    ... {(i+1)*len(ly_range)}/{n_total} done \"\n                  f\"({elapsed:.0f}s elapsed, ~{remaining:.0f}s left)\")\n\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    print(f\"  Best: loss={results[0][0]:.5f}  \"\n          f\"η_T={results[0][1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={results[0][2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"params={results[0][3]}\")\n    return results\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local optimisation from a starting point\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(x0, zone_id, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=400, nG=nG_OPT):\n    \"\"\"Nelder-Mead from x0.\"\"\"\n    def merit(x):\n        return merit_zone_full(x, zone_id, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG)\n\n    res = minimize(merit, x0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n                   options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-5})\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\": best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss\": float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main optimisation pipeline\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"#\"*65)\n    print(\"#  MFE-focused optimisation  (targets: ideal paper Fig 2e)\")\n    print(\"#\"*65)\n\n    # ── Load previous best or use Table 1 starting points ────────────────────\n    zone_results = []\n    try:\n        with open(RESULTS_FILE) as fh:\n            prev = json.load(fh)\n        for k in range(3):\n            z = prev[\"zones\"][k]\n            zone_results.append({\n                \"params\":  z[\"params\"],\n                \"T_array\": {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_0149i4K3K19P4df3uVpdTgfD","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KAqkqFmdhYutG6j7X3NJpw","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/Users/shrutibadhwar/Documents/2026/testpackage/sciagent-bench/results/20260608T200907Z/photonics/photonics__cc-bare__sonnet/project/optimize_mfe.py","content":"\"\"\"\nFocused MFE optimisation for the three-zone TiO2/N-BK7 metasurface in-coupler.\n\nProblem: MFE=20.83%; need MFE≥25%.\nRoot cause: zone 3 η_T(-10°)=16.4% (paper ideal: 27%).\nPrevious optimizer used full-XFOV average → traded off -10° for average,\ncausing regression. Fix: optimize DIRECTLY at XFOV=-10° (2-angle merit).\n\nStrategy per zone:\n  1. Grid scan (x_p × Λ_y) at XFOV=-10° with Table-1 (w, r).\n  2. Local Nelder-Mead from best scan pts using 2-angle merit\n     (XFOV=-10° with weight 8, XFOV=0° with weight 1).\n  3. Accept result only if η_T(-10°) ≥ previous − 2%.\n  4. Final full sweep → compute MFE.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json, time\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import minimize\n\nfrom rcwa_metasurface import (\n    XFOV_DEG, THETA_GLASS, PERIOD_X,\n    run_rcwa, angle_sweep, compute_mfe,\n    plot_efficiency_curves, plot_mfe_curve, plot_zone_geometry,\n)\n\nRESULTS_FILE = \"zone_results.json\"\n\n# Ideal paper targets (Fig 2e) — assume R[-1,0]≈0 → T+R=100%\nT_IDEAL = [0.96, 0.54, 0.27]\nR_IDEAL = [0.04, 0.46, 0.73]\n\nIDX_N10 =  0   # XFOV=-10°\nIDX_ZRO = 10   # XFOV=  0°\nIDX_P10 = 20   # XFOV=+10°\n\n# Table-1 (w, r) — fix these during scan\nTABLE1_WR = [\n    (110.0,  50.0),    # Zone 1\n    (110.0,  85.0),    # Zone 2\n    (100.0,  98.0),    # Zone 3\n]\n\nnG_FAST = 35   # scan (speed)\nnG_OPT  = 51   # local opt + final sweep\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# 2-angle merit: heavy at XFOV=-10°, light at XFOV=0°\n# Uses only 2 RCWA calls per evaluation → ~10× faster than 21-angle merit\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef merit2(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_OPT):\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if (w  < 20 or w  > 300 or r < 10 or r > 220 or\n            xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 60 or\n            ly < 50 or ly > 700):\n        return 1e6\n    try:\n        T0, R0 = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_N10], nG=nG)\n        T1, R1 = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_ZRO], nG=nG)\n    except Exception:\n        return 1e6\n    loss = 8.0 * ((T0 - tgt_T)**2 + (R0 - tgt_R)**2) \\\n         + 1.0 * ((T1 - tgt_T)**2 + (R1 - tgt_R)**2)\n    return loss / 9.0\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Grid scan at XFOV=-10° only\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R):\n    n = len(xp_arr) * len(ly_arr)\n    print(f\"  Grid {zone_id+1} (w={w:.0f} r={r:.0f}): \"\n          f\"{len(xp_arr)}×{len(ly_arr)}={n} pts @ XFOV=-10°\", flush=True)\n    t0 = time.time()\n    tg0 = THETA_GLASS[IDX_N10]\n    results = []\n    for xp in xp_arr:\n        for ly in ly_arr:\n            try:\n                T, R = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, tg0, nG=nG_FAST)\n                loss = (T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2\n                results.append((loss, T, R, float(xp), float(ly)))\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    dt = time.time() - t0\n    b = results[0]\n    print(f\"    {dt:.0f}s | best η_T={b[1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={b[2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"xp={b[3]:.0f}  Ly={b[4]:.0f}\", flush=True)\n    return results, w, r\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local Nelder-Mead from a single starting point\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=300, nG=nG_OPT):\n    res = minimize(\n        lambda x: merit2(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG),\n        p0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n        options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-6},\n    )\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\":  best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss2\":   float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n Fix: optimize DIRECTLY at XFOV=-10° (2-angle merit).\n\nStrategy per zone:\n  1. Grid scan (x_p × Λ_y) at XFOV=-10° with Table-1 (w, r).\n  2. Local Nelder-Mead from best scan pts using 2-angle merit\n     (XFOV=-10° with weight 8, XFOV=0° with weight 1).\n  3. Accept result only if η_T(-10°) ≥ previous − 2%.\n  4. Final full sweep → compute MFE.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json, time\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import minimize\n\nfrom rcwa_metasurface import (\n    XFOV_DEG, THETA_GLASS, PERIOD_X,\n    run_rcwa, angle_sweep, compute_mfe,\n    plot_efficiency_curves, plot_mfe_curve, plot_zone_geometry,\n)\n\nRESULTS_FILE = \"zone_results.json\"\n\n# Ideal paper targets (Fig 2e) — assume R[-1,0]≈0 → T+R=100%\nT_IDEAL = [0.96, 0.54, 0.27]\nR_IDEAL = [0.04, 0.46, 0.73]\n\nIDX_N10 =  0   # XFOV=-10°\nIDX_ZRO = 10   # XFOV=  0°\nIDX_P10 = 20   # XFOV=+10°\n\n# Table-1 (w, r) — fix these during scan\nTABLE1_WR = [\n    (110.0,  50.0),    # Zone 1\n    (110.0,  85.0),    # Zone 2\n    (100.0,  98.0),    # Zone 3\n]\n\nnG_FAST = 35   # scan (speed)\nnG_OPT  = 51   # local opt + final sweep\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# 2-angle merit: heavy at XFOV=-10°, light at XFOV=0°\n# Uses only 2 RCWA calls per evaluation → ~10× faster than 21-angle merit\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef merit2(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_OPT):\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if (w  < 20 or w  > 300 or r < 10 or r > 220 or\n            xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 60 or\n            ly < 50 or ly > 700):\n        return 1e6\n    try:\n        T0, R0 = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_N10], nG=nG)\n        T1, R1 = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_ZRO], nG=nG)\n    except Exception:\n        return 1e6\n    loss = 8.0 * ((T0 - tgt_T)**2 + (R0 - tgt_R)**2) \\\n         + 1.0 * ((T1 - tgt_T)**2 + (R1 - tgt_R)**2)\n    return loss / 9.0\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Grid scan at XFOV=-10° only\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R):\n    n = len(xp_arr) * len(ly_arr)\n    print(f\"  Grid {zone_id+1} (w={w:.0f} r={r:.0f}): \"\n          f\"{len(xp_arr)}×{len(ly_arr)}={n} pts @ XFOV=-10°\", flush=True)\n    t0 = time.time()\n    tg0 = THETA_GLASS[IDX_N10]\n    results = []\n    for xp in xp_arr:\n        for ly in ly_arr:\n            try:\n                T, R = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, tg0, nG=nG_FAST)\n                loss = (T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2\n                results.append((loss, T, R, float(xp), float(ly)))\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    dt = time.time() - t0\n    b = results[0]\n    print(f\"    {dt:.0f}s | best η_T={b[1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={b[2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"xp={b[3]:.0f}  Ly={b[4]:.0f}\", flush=True)\n    return results, w, r\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local Nelder-Mead from a single starting point\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=300, nG=nG_OPT):\n    res = minimize(\n        lambda x: merit2(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG),\n        p0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n        options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-6},\n    )\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\":  best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss2\":   float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n η_T(-10°)=16.4% (paper ideal: 27%).\n\nStrategy:\n - Fix w and r from Table 1 (already close to those values in current best).\n - Scan (x_p, Λ_y) grid at XFOV=-10° to find better starting geometries.\n - Run Nelder-Mead from best scan point for each zone.\n - Use ideal paper targets (η_T, η_R) = (0.96/0.54/0.27, 0.04/0.46/0.73).\n - Heavy weight on XFOV=-10° in merit (the MFE bottleneck angle).\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json, time\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import minimize\n\nfrom rcwa_metasurface import (\n    XFOV_DEG, THETA_GLASS, PERIOD_X,\n    run_rcwa, angle_sweep, compute_mfe,\n    plot_efficiency_curves, plot_mfe_curve, plot_zone_geometry,\n)\n\nRESULTS_FILE = \"zone_results.json\"\n\n# Ideal paper targets (Fig 2e), assuming R[-1,0]≈0\nT_IDEAL = [0.96, 0.54, 0.27]\nR_IDEAL = [0.04, 0.46, 0.73]\n\nIDX_NEG10 = 0   # XFOV=-10° index\n\n# Table 1 (w, r) values — good starting point for all zones\nTABLE1_WR = [\n    (110.0, 50.0),    # Zone 1\n    (110.0, 85.0),    # Zone 2\n    (100.0, 98.0),    # Zone 3\n]\n\nnG_FAST = 35   # harmonics for grid scan (speed)\nnG_FULL = 51   # harmonics for local opt and final sweep\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Merit: weighted MSE targeting ideal (T, R) across XFOV\n# Heavy weight at XFOV=-10° (the MFE bottleneck)\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef merit_weighted(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_FULL, heavy_w=8.0):\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if (w < 30 or w > 280 or r < 15 or r > 200 or\n            xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 50 or ly < 60 or ly > 600):\n        return 1e6\n\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep((w, r, xp, ly), nG=nG)\n\n    weights = np.ones(len(XFOV_DEG))\n    weights[IDX_NEG10] = heavy_w\n    weights /= weights.sum()\n\n    T_m = float(np.dot(weights, T_arr))\n    R_m = float(np.dot(weights, R_arr))\n    return (T_m - tgt_T)**2 + (R_m - tgt_R)**2\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Single-angle loss (used only in grid scan for speed)\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef loss_at_neg10(w, r, xp, ly, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_FAST):\n    try:\n        T, R = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10], nG=nG)\n        return (T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2, T, R\n    except Exception:\n        return 1e6, 0.0, 0.0\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# 2-D grid scan (x_p × Λ_y) at XFOV=-10° only\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R):\n    n = len(xp_arr) * len(ly_arr)\n    print(f\"  Grid scan zone {zone_id+1} \"\n          f\"(w={w:.0f}, r={r:.0f}): {len(xp_arr)}×{len(ly_arr)}={n} pts\", flush=True)\n    t0 = time.time()\n    results = []\n    for xp in xp_arr:\n        for ly in ly_arr:\n            loss, T, R = loss_at_neg10(w, r, xp, ly, tgt_T, tgt_R)\n            results.append((loss, T, R, [w, r, xp, ly]))\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    dt = time.time() - t0\n    print(f\"    done in {dt:.0f}s  \"\n          f\"best: η_T={results[0][1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={results[0][2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"loss={results[0][0]:.5f}  xp={results[0][3][2]:.0f}  Ly={results[0][3][3]:.0f}\")\n    return results\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local (Nelder-Mead) optimisation\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=400, nG=nG_FULL):\n    res = minimize(\n        lambda x: merit_weighted(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG),\n        p0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n        options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-5},\n    )\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\":  best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss\":    float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Per-zone optimisation\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef optimise_zone(zone_id, prev_params, xp_arr, ly_arr, top_k=5, maxiter=400):\n    tgt_T = T_IDEAL[zone_id]\n    tgt_R = R_IDEAL[zone_id]\n    w, r  = TABLE1_WR[zone_id]\n\n    print(f\"\\n{'='*60}\")\n    print(f\"Zone {zone_id+1}  target η_T={tgt_T*100:.0f}%  η_R={tgt_R*100:.0f}%\")\n    print(f\"{'='*60}\")\n\n    # Print current starting efficiency\n    T0_cur = run_rcwa(*prev_params, THETA_GLASS[IDX_NEG10], nG=nG_FULL)\n    print(f\"  Current params η_T(-10°)={T0_cur[0]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"η_R(-10°)={T0_cur[1]*100:.1f}%\")\n\n    # Grid scan\n    scan = grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R)\n\n    # Also include previous best (different w,r but worth trying)\n    candidates = [s[3] for s in scan[:top_k]]\n    candidates.append(list(prev_params))  # include prev best\n\n    best_loss = 1e9\n    best_res  = None\n\n    for ci, p0 in enumerate(candidates):\n        tag = \"prev\" if ci == len(candidates) - 1 else f\"scan#{ci+1}\"\n        print(f\"  Local opt from {tag} (loss_scan={scan[min(ci, top_k-1)][0]:.5f}): \",\n              end=\"\", flush=True)\n        t0 = time.time()\n        res = local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=maxiter)\n        dt = time.time() - t0\n        T_n = np.array(res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n        R_n = np.array(res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n        print(f\"loss={res['loss']:.5f}  η_T(-10°)={T_n:.1f}%  \"\n              f\"η_R(-10°)={R_n:.1f}%  ({dt:.0f}s)\")\n        if res[\"loss\"] < best_loss:\n            best_loss = res[\"loss\"]\n            best_res  = res\n\n    w_b, r_b, xp_b, ly_b = best_res[\"params\"]\n    T_b = np.array(best_res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n    R_b = np.array(best_res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_NEG10] * 100\n    print(f\"  → Best zone {zone_id+1}: loss={best_loss:.5f}  \"\n          f\"η_T(-10°)={T_b:.1f}%  η_R(-10°)={R_b:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"[w={w_b:.0f} r={r_b:.0f} xp={xp_b:.0f} Ly={ly_b:.0f}]\")\n\n    return best_res\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"#\"*60)\n    print(\"#  MFE-focused optimisation  (ideal paper Fig 2e targets)\")\n    print(\"#\"*60)\n\n    # Load previous results\n    try:\n        with open(RESULTS_FILE) as fh:\n            prev = json.load(fh)\n        zone_results = []\n        for k in range(3):\n            z = prev[\"zones\"][k]\n            zone_results.append({\n                \"params\":  z[\"params\"],\n                \"T_array\": [t/100 for t in z[\"T_pct\"]],\n                \"R_array\": [r/100 for r in z[\"R_pct\"]],\n            })\n        print(\"Loaded previous results from zone_results.json\")\n        prev_mfe = prev.get(\"mfe\", 0.0)\n        print(f\"Previous MFE = angle_sweep(tuple(p), nG=nG_FULL)\n            zone_results.append({\n                \"params\": list(p),\n                \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n                \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n            })\n        print(\"Using Table 1 starting geometry (no previous results found).\")\n\n    best_results = [dict(r) for r in zone_results]\n\n    # ── Zone 3: the MFE bottleneck ────────────────────────────────────────────\n    # Fix w=100, r=98 (Table 1). accept if not worse by >2%\n        best_results[2] = res3\n\n    # ── Zone 2: improve η_R(-10°) from ~34% toward 46% ───────────────────────\n    xp2 = np.arange(80, 400, 30)\n    ly2 = np.arange(120, 380, 30)\n    res2 = optimise_zone(\n        zone_id=1,\n        prev_params=zone_results[1][\"params\"],\n        xp_arr=xp2, ly_arr=ly2,\n        top_k=5, maxiter=500,\n    )\n    T2_new = np.array(res2[\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    T2_old = np.array(zone_results[1][\"T_array\"])[IDX_NEG10]\n    if T2_new > T2_old - 0.02:\n        best_results[1] = res2\n\n    # merit_sum(x, tgt_T, beta=3.0, nG=nG_OPT):\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if (w < 20 or w > 300 or r < 10 or r > 220 or\n            xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 60 or\n            ly < 50 or ly >        return 1e6\n    # At each angle: push T→tgt_T and T+R→1\n    loss0 = (T0 - tgt_T)**2 + beta * (1.0 - T0 - R0)**2\n    loss1 = (T1 - tgt_T)**2 + beta * (1.0 - T1 - R1)**2\n    return (8.0 * loss0 + 1.0 * loss1) / 9.0\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Grid scan at XFOV=-10°: scan (x_p, Λ_y) looking for min(T-tgt)^2+(1-T-R)^2\n# three-zone TiO2/N-BK7 metasurface in-coupler.\n\nProblem: MFE=20.83%; need MFE≥25%.\nRoot cause: zone 3 η_T(-10°)=16.4% (paper ideal: 27%).\nPrevious optimizer used full-XFOV average → traded off -10° for average,\ncausing regression. Fix: optimize DIRECTLY at XFOV=-10° (2-angle merit).\n\nStrategy per zone:\n  1. Grid scan (x_p × Λ_y) at XFOV=-10° with Table-1 (w, r).\n  2. Local Nelder-Mead from best scan pts using 2-angle merit\n     (XFOV=-10° with weight 8, XFOV=0° with weight 1).\n  3. Accept result only if η_T(-10°) ≥ previous − 2%.\n  4. Final full sweep → compute MFE.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json, time\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import minimize\n\nfrom rcwa_metasurface import (\n    XFOV_DEG, THETA_GLASS, PERIOD_X,\n    run_rcwa, angle_sweep, compute_mfe,\n    plot_efficiency_curves, plot_mfe_curve, plot_zone_geometry,\n)\n\nRESULTS_FILE = \"zone_results.json\"\n\n# Ideal paper targets (Fig 2e) — assume R[-1,0]≈0 → T+R=100%\nT_IDEAL = [0.96, 0.54, 0.27]\nR_IDEAL = [0.04, 0.46, 0.73]\n\nIDX_N10 =  0   # XFOV=-10°\nIDX_ZRO = 10   # XFOV=  0°\nIDX_P10 = 20   # XFOV=+10°\n\n# Table-1 (w, r) — fix these during scan\nTABLE1_WR = [\n    (110.0,  50.0),    # Zone 1\n    (110.0,  85.0),    # Zone 2\n    (100.0,  98.0),    # Zone 3\n]\n\nnG_FAST = 35   # scan (speed)\nnG_OPT  = 51   # local opt + final sweep\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# 2-angle merit: heavy at XFOV=-10°, light at XFOV=0°\n# Uses only 2 RCWA calls per evaluation → ~10× faster than 21-angle merit\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef merit2(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG_OPT):\n    w, r, xp, ly = x\n    if (w  < 20 or w  > 300 or r < 10 or r > 220 or\n            xp < 20 or xp > PERIOD_X + r + 60 or\n            ly < 50 or ly > 700):\n        return 1e6\n    try:\n        T0, R0 = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_N10], nG=nG)\n        T1, R1 = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, THETA_GLASS[IDX_ZRO], nG=nG)\n    except Exception:\n        return 1e6\n    loss = 8.0 * ((T0 - tgt_T)**2 + (R0 - tgt_R)**2) \\\n         + 1.0 * ((T1 - tgt_T)**2 + (R1 - tgt_R)**2)\n    return loss / 9.0\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Grid scan at XFOV=-10° only\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef grid_scan(zone_id, w, r, xp_arr, ly_arr, tgt_T, tgt_R):\n    n = len(xp_arr) * len(ly_arr)\n    print(f\"  Grid {zone_id+1} (w={w:.0f} r={r:.0f}): \"\n          f\"{len(xp_arr)}×{len(ly_arr)}={n} pts @ XFOV=-10°\", flush=True)\n    t0 = time.time()\n    tg0 = THETA_GLASS[IDX_N10]\n    results = []\n    for xp in xp_arr:\n        for ly in ly_arr:\n            try:\n                T, R = run_rcwa(w, r, xp, ly, tg0, nG=nG_FAST)\n                loss = (T - tgt_T)**2 + (R - tgt_R)**2\n                results.append((loss, T, R, float(xp), float(ly)))\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n    results.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])\n    dt = time.time() - t0\n    b = results[0]\n    print(f\"    {dt:.0f}s | best η_T={b[1]*100:.1f}%  η_R={b[2]*100:.1f}%  \"\n          f\"xp={b[3]:.0f}  Ly={b[4]:.0f}\", flush=True)\n    return results, w, r\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Local Nelder-Mead from a single starting point\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef local_opt(p0, tgt_T, tgt_R, maxiter=300, nG=nG_OPT):\n    res = minimize(\n        lambda x: merit2(x, tgt_T, tgt_R, nG=nG),\n        p0, method=\"Nelder-Mead\",\n        options={\"maxiter\": maxiter, \"xatol\": 0.5, \"fatol\": 1e-6},\n    )\n    best = res.x\n    T_arr, R_arr = angle_sweep(tuple(best), nG=nG)\n    return {\n        \"params\":  best.tolist(),\n        \"T_array\": T_arr.tolist(),\n        \"R_array\": R_arr.tolist(),\n        \"loss2\":   float(res.fun),\n        \"success\": res.success,\n    }\n\n\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n# Main\n# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\ndef main():\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"#\"*62)\n    print(\"#  MFE-focused optimisation — 2-angle merit, -10° priority\")\n    print(\"#\"*62)\n\n    # Load previous JSON\n    try:\n        with open(RESULTS_FILE) as fh:\n            prev = json.load(fh)\n        prev_params = [z[\"params\"] for z in prev[\"zones\"]]\n        prev_T = [[t/100 for t in z[\"T_pct\"]] for z in prev[\"zones\"]]\n        prev_R =    prev_params = [list(p) for p in TABLE1_PARAMS]\n        prev_T = [None] * 3\n        prev_R = [None] * 3\n        print(\"No previous results; starting from Table 1.\")\n\n    best = [\n        {\"params\": prev_params[k],\n         \"T_array\": prev_T[k],\n         \"R_array\": prev_R[k]}\n        for k in range(3)\n    ]\n\n    # ── Zone 3 (bottleneck) r3, s[3], s[4]] for s in scan3[:5]]\n    top3_pts.append(list(prev_params[2]))  # also try previous best\n\n    best3_loss = 1e9\n    best3_res  = None\n    for ci, p0 in enumerate(top3_pts):\n      T_n = np.array(res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_N10] * 100\n        R_n = np.array(res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_N10] * 100\n        print(f\"η_T(-10°)={T_n:.1f}% η_R(-10°)={R_n:.1f}%  ({dt:.0f}s)\")\n        if best2_loss = res[\"loss2\"]\n            best2_res  = res\n\n    T2_new = np.array(best2_res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_N10]\n    T2_old = np.array(prev_T[1])[IDX_N10] if prev_T[1] else 0.0\n    if T2_new >= local_opt(p0, T_IDEAL[0], R_IDEAL[0], maxiter=300)\n        dt = time.time() - t0\n        T_n = np.array(res[\"T_array\"])[IDX_N10] * 100\n        R_n = np.array(res[\"R_array\"])[IDX_N10] * 100\n        print(f\"η_T(-10°)={T_n:.1f}% η_R(-10°)={R_n:.1f}%  ({dt:.0f}s)\")\n        if res[\"loss2\"] < best1_loss:\n            best1_loss = res[\"loss2\"]\n            best1_res  = res\n\n    T1_new = 0.25 else 'FAIL ✗'}  \"\n          f\"(target ≥ 25.0%,  paper = 25.3%)\")\n    print(f\"  Bottleneck at XFOV = {XFOV_DEG[np.argmin(coupling)]:+.1f}°\")\n    for k in range(3):\n        T0 = THETA_GLASS.tolist(),\n        \"mfe\":             mfe_final,\n        \"mfe_percent\":     mfe_final * 100,\n        \"mfe_passes\":      bool(mfe_final >= 0.25),\n        \"coupling_pct\":    (coupling * 100).tolist(),\n        \"zones\": [\n            {\n                \"zone\":       k + 1,\n                \"params\":     best[k][\"params\"],\n                \"source\":     \"mfe_opt_2angle\",\n                \"T_pct\":      (T_zones[k] * 100).tolist(),\n                \"R_pct\":      (R_zones[k] * 100).tolist(),\n                \"T_mean_pct\": The R[-1,0] contribution is about 10%, and the optimizer can't eliminate it.\n\nLet me think about whether there's a fundamental limit here. The R[-1,0] order in glass at XFOV=-10° has:\nsin(θ_R[-1,0]) = sin(41.19°) - λ/(n_glass × Λ) = 0.658 - 532/(1.5195×453) = 0.658 - 0.773 = -0.115\nThis is a real propagating order. Energy conservation requires that all diffracted orders sum to unity, and at XFOV=-10°, the incident angle in glass is 41.19°, which is just above the critical angle. The T[0,0] order in air would require sin(θ_T[0,0]) = n_glass × sin(41.19°), which exceeds 1 and becomes evanescent. So the zeroth-order transmission is actually evanescent since sin_out exceeds 1.0, meaning all the light gets redirected into the first-order diffracted mode T[-1,0] along with the reflected orders. The power distribution then depends on how much energy gets absorbed by the TiO2 material, which is minimal at around 1-2%, leaving most of the power to split between the diffracted transmission and reflections.\n\nTo push the combined transmission and reflection efficiency higher, I need to suppress the backward-diffracted reflection R[-1,0] to below 4%. This comes down to engineering destructive interference for that specific diffraction order by carefully positioning the structural elements—the beam and pillar arrangement—so their Fourier components at that spatial frequency cancel each other out through phase alignment. So the optimal x_p should be around Λ/2 or 3Λ/4 to achieve the destructive interference, but the current optimizer is settling on 179 nm which is too close to Λ/4. I should run a targeted scan across x_p values in fine increments for zone 2 while keeping the other parameters fixed to find where the cancellation actually happens.\n\nThe merit function is already implicitly minimizing R[-1,0] by maximizing T+R, so the optimizer is working correctly—the real question is whether complete suppression of the -1 order is even possible for this geometry at -10° XFOV, which depends on whether the beam and pillar contributions can be made equal in amplitude and opposite in phase.\n\nSince deriving these conditions analytically is complex, I should expand the parameter search space for zone 2 and let the optimizer explore wider bounds for w, r, x_p, and Ly to find the combination that best satisfies both amplitude and phase matching conditions.
